response.justification: Well over the required six years of fullstack experience with a stack that substantially overlaps the role: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which is an explicitly required and uncommon skill. A strong testing culture (TDD, authored test libraries, taught testing courses) matches the quality expectations. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, Kotlin) and look learnable given the breadth demonstrated.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS
Current AI-agent and MCP development experience, directly matching a required skill
Deep testing expertise: TDD practice, authored test frameworks, delivered testing courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience listed, the role's primary backend framework
Kotlin exposure absent and Java experience is dated and brief
Frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js rather than React
